description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.6 Docker image and defines a single test stage. Add a luacheck job in the test stage that runs the following commands in order: apt-get update, apt-get install -y zip unzip, pip install hererocks, hererocks lua_install -l 5.1 -r latest, export PATH=$PATH:$PWD/lua_install/bin, luarocks install luacheck, and finally luacheck plugin. The job has no additional caches, artifacts, or service dependencies and runs on every pipeline execution. Ensure the job name, stage, and exact script commands are preserved as specified.
